steps.title: Spot the key phrase
steps.content: The second sentence says “Duchamp's Fountain did just that” — the work actually accomplished what Duchamp intended in sentence 1. The transition must confirm that the intention was realized.

steps.title: Match the confirmation
steps.content: Indeed, affirms that the intention was fulfilled — “did just that” directly supports this confirmation. The other three either signal parallelism, contrast, or addition rather than affirming the realization of the intent. That matches choice A — A is correct.
